metadata.title: Start a Vending Business
metadata.metaDescription: Learn how to start a vending business with support.

props.heading: Start Your Vending Business with Confidence
props.body: Turn your entrepreneurial goals into reality with our guided steps for new vending operators.

warnings.message: Hero copy is generic and requires supporting brand claims.

nodes.text: Before you invest in hardware, the most critical step is ensuring there is a real need for your machines.
Operators should validate location demand before buying machines. Focus on high foot traffic areas, dwell time, and checking existing competition.

items.question: What is the most important first step?
items.answer: Validating location demand is the priority. Always assess foot traffic and dwell time before purchasing equipment.

warnings.message: CTA placement relies on inferred action flow.
